hero.title: Transform your space with
hero.subtitle: Professional installation of high-quality curtains. Design, advice and custom fitting for homes and offices.
about.label: About Me
about.title: I'm Jose Mendoza, curtain specialist technician
about.text1: With over 10 years of experience in the industry, I transform spaces with curtain solutions that combine functionality, aesthetics, and premium quality.
about.text2: My approach focuses on understanding each client's needs, offering personalized advice from material selection to final installation. Every project is an opportunity to create unique environments that reflect your style.
about.cardDesc: Each client receives an exclusive service tailored to their needs and budget.
services.label: Our Services
services.title: Curtain solutions for every space
services.subtitle: We offer a wide variety of styles and materials to meet the needs of any environment.
services.blackout.title: Blackout Curtains
services.blackout.desc: Total light blockage for perfect rest and absolute privacy.
services.sheer.title: Sheer Curtains
services.sheer.desc: Elegance and softness that allows filtered natural light through.
services.roller.title: Roller Shades
services.roller.desc: Modern and functional design ideal for contemporary spaces.
services.panel.title: Japanese Panel
services.panel.desc: Oriental sophistication perfect for large windows and room dividers.
gallery.label: Project Gallery
gallery.title: Our recent work
gallery.subtitle: Discover how we've transformed spaces in Cartagena and its surroundings with our curtain installations.
benefits.label: Why choose us
benefits.title: Benefits of working with me
benefits.installationDesc: Expert fitting with specialized tools and perfect finishes.
benefits.adviceDesc: I guide you every step to find the perfect solution for your space.
benefits.qualityDesc: I only work with the best fabrics and mechanisms on the market.
benefits.warrantyDesc: Your satisfaction is my priority. I guarantee every installation.
